what: Open the edit dialog for the knowledge entry the user clicked
why: User clicked an entry in the tree and wants to modify its content or metadata

success_handling.criteria: User saves changes to the entry

decisions.rationale: KnowledgeEditDialog already handles load → edit → save → audit; no duplication needed

decisions.reason: Reload tree after save or cancel
decisions.rationale: Ensures the tree reflects latest data after an edit (title/category may have changed)
